Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector

Class TypedFinder<Type extends com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.UserManagementItem>

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector.TypedFinder<Type>
Type Parameters:
Type - a UserManagementItem
public class TypedFinder<Type extends com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.UserManagementItem> extends Object
The typed finder is used to search for Users, groups, or tenants.

  • Constructor Details

    • TypedFinder

      protected TypedFinder(com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.UserService service, int token, Class<Type> type, com.saperion.jcs.modules.api.LazyLoadingStrategy strategy)

  • Method Details

    • with

      public TypedFinder<Type> with(Map<com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.DescriptorField,Object> keyValues) throws SearchException
      Searches for items with any of the specified values.
      Parameters:
      keyValues - map with fields and values
      Returns:
      this TypedFinder instance
      Throws:
      SearchException - when a value does not match a field's type

    • with

      public TypedFinder<Type> with(com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.DescriptorField field, Object value) throws SearchException
      Searches for a UserManagementItem by using one field and one value.
      Parameters:
      field - the field to search in. Existing fields can be obtained by a Descriptor
      value - the value to search for
      Returns:
      this TypedFinder instance
      Throws:
      SearchException - when the value does not match the field's type

    • with

      public TypedFinder<Type> with(List<com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.Criterion> criteria) throws SearchException
      Searches for items UserManagementItem that match the given criteria.
      Parameters:
      criteria - criteria that should be matched
      Returns:
      this TypedFinder instance
      Throws:
      SearchException - when criteria do not match

    • byName

      public TypedFinder<Type> byName(String name) throws SearchException
      Search for a UserManagementItem by it's name.
      Parameters:
      name - the item's name
      Returns:
      this TypedFinder instance
      Throws:
      SearchException - when items of this type cannot be searched for by name

    • byId

      public TypedFinder<Type> byId(int id) throws SearchException
      Search for a UserManagementItem by it's ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the item's ID
      Returns:
      this TypedFinder instance
      Throws:
      SearchException - when items of this type cannot be searched for by name

    • in

      public TypedFinder<Type> in(com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.Tenant tenant) throws SearchException
      Parameters:
      tenant - Tenant in which should be searched for
      Returns:
      this TypedFinder instance
      Throws:
      SearchException - if type to search for is not supported

    • combinedBy

      public TypedFinder<Type> combinedBy(com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.DescriptorOperation op)
      If called multiple times, the last call wins and overwrites the first one.
      Parameters:
      op - the operation how the descriptor-fields should be combined (e.g. AND, OR)
      Returns:
      this TypedFinder instance

    • use

      public TypedFinder<Type> use(com.saperion.jcs.modules.api.LazyLoadingStrategy strategy)

    • result

      public TypedResult<Type> result() throws AuthenticationException, BackendException
      Returns:
      the result of the search performed by with(java.util.Map) or with(DescriptorField, Object)
      Throws:
      AuthenticationException - user not logged on
      BackendException - exception in backend when searching
